core_layout_strategy: Vertical Scoreboard Layout. We abandon the horizontal 'Logo VS Logo' layout because it mathematically cannot fit two 24-character names + logos in 360dp. Instead, we use a vertical stack (Away Team Row over Home Team Row). This allocates a dedicated, flexible-height text block for each team name, supporting up to 2 lines per line without ever truncating.

layout_measurements.total_internal_height: 156dp content + 32dp padding = 188dp (Fits safely inside 200dp with 12dp to spare)

no_scores_upcoming.description: Displays team names prominently with an explicit '@' or 'VS' indicator.
no_scores_upcoming.away_row: [Logo: 40x40dp] -> [Spacer: 16dp] -> [Text: Team Name, weight 1f, maxLines 2] -> [Spacer: 16dp] -> [Text: '@', 32dp width, right aligned]
no_scores_upcoming.home_row: [Logo: 40x40dp] -> [Spacer: 16dp] -> [Text: Team Name, weight 1f, maxLines 2] -> [Spacer: 16dp] -> [Empty space for alignment]

with_scores_live_final.away_row: [Logo: 40x40dp] -> [Spacer: 16dp] -> [Text: Team Name, weight 1f, maxLines 2] -> [Spacer: 16dp] -> [Text: Score, 32dp width, right aligned]
with_scores_live_final.home_row: [Logo: 40x40dp] -> [Spacer: 16dp] -> [Text: Team Name, weight 1f, maxLines 2] -> [Spacer: 16dp] -> [Text: Score, 32dp width, right aligned]

focused.glow: Adding a cyan drop shadow or outer glow is recommended if Compose version supports it, otherwise rely on the 3dp border + scale.

typography.team_name: 16sp, Medium, Color: #FFFFFF, maxLines: 2, overflow: TextOverflow.Visible, LineHeight: 20sp

definitive_answer_for_long_names: For strings like 'Vegas Golden Knights' (24 chars), a horizontal layout fails. By using the Vertical Scoreboard Layout, the team name text composable is granted 'weight(1f)', yielding exactly 200dp of width. At 16sp, 200dp holds ~22 characters per line. By explicitly setting 'maxLines = 2', 'Vegas Golden Knights' will perfectly wrap to a second line. The Row height of 56dp accommodates 2 lines of 16sp text (approx 40dp tall) vertically centered next to the 40dp logo. NO TRUNCATION EVER OCCURS.
instructions_to_main_agent: Implement the Android TV Jetpack Compose component strictly according to the compose_pseudo_code and layout_measurements. Ensure the text composables for team names do NOT contain TextOverflow.Ellipsis and strictly use maxLines = 2. Apply a 1.05f scale and 3dp Cyan border when focused. Do not deviate from the 360x200dp bounds.
